[[Jori Daragon]] stole an '''armed courier''' [[Starship/Legends|starship]] from [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]] to pursue her brother [[Gav Daragon]] and [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] to [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]]. Gav managed to warn her of the pending destruction of the star by Sadow, and Jori escaped in the ship, along with the [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] fleet, and penetrated the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. Using the ship, Jori helped destroy the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] fleet.<ref name="Fall of the Sith Empire 4" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]]
